title: casasia clusiifolia var. hirsuta
intro: Casasia clusiifolia var. hirsuta, a variety of the Casasia clusiifolia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee of the forest due to its caffeine-rich properties. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. Casasia clusiifolia var. hirsuta has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and other ailments.
